title: Orb Of Origin Cooldown
description: Adds a Cooldown to the Orb of Origin to prevent abuse of the item
body:
Adds a Cooldown to the Orb of Origin to prevent abuse of the item To change the length of the cooldown open the datapack and simply change the amount of tick in the (cooldown) power 1 Minutes is about 1200 ticks here is a [Calculator](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Calculators/Tick) The default time is 15 Minutes Specifically Designed to be used within the [Sanctuary ModPack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sanctuary-remake)
Feedback
